name_cn:
Genuine Quality
5BA290 New Shell Bag. The simple design continues Miu's lazy American old-money style, using top-grade imported calfskin with a high-quality, soft texture. The curved sides add a more stylish look. The zipper opens instantly to become a large tote. The long handle design offers greater practicality, suitable for underarm or hand-carry. The simple and casual style, with a super large capacity, is an excellent choice for commuting or shopping. Lined with new linen, with a zippered pocket. Dimensions: 33 X 21 X 13cm, comes with original packaging
